text: client for friday just emailed — wants to swap the duck confit for 'something vegetarian, surprise us.' it's wednesday. WEDNESDAY. mise en place already half done.
lmaooo who does that two days out. same headcount at least?
18 pax, same budget, service at 7. jess is already pulling cauliflower from the walk-in. i'm doing a mushroom wellington situation and hoping for the best.
wellington for 18 by friday is a bold call even for you ngl
c'est correct, j'ai fait pire. sienna's coming to help me prep thursday night if i feed her first — done deal, no notes.
bring extra filling she will absolutely eat half of it before it gets wrapped and you know this
already doubling the duxelles. hawthorne shift ends at 4 friday so timing's tight but it'll land. always does.
ok legend. plate pic or it didn't happen
yves the Hendersons in 412 just called down AGAIN asking if their upgrade is confirmed. third time this morning 😭
already on it — told them at 8:15 the junior suite's locked in. put a note in the file so whoever picks up desk knows.
ok good. also did you eat? you've been on since 6 and it's almost noon lol
had Papa Luc's leftover tourtière so I'm fine. thursday mise en place is going to wreck me tho — the Deschamps corporate client doubled their charcuterie order at 11pm last night
DOUBLED?? who calls at 11pm to double a charcuterie order
the Deschamps people, apparently. oui. Jess is grabbing extra fromage on her way in but I'm still short on the cured stuff. c'est n'importe quoi
want me to call that deli on Canyon Rd before my break? I think they carry what you need
please. ask for Marcus, tell him it's for Hawthorne catering. he'll hold it for me.
Yves — Marisol from Clover & Salt says you never confirmed Thursday's order. She's got 4 lbs of the aged goat set aside but can't hold past tomorrow noon.
Mon dieu, I emailed her Friday — check her spam. Confirm it yes, 4 lbs plus the fig spread if any's left.
Fig spread's gone, sold out by 10am Saturday. She can sub cherry mostarda, two jars. Want me to tell her yes?
Mostarda works, menu's flexible. Tell her I'll grab it Thursday before my Hawthorne shift. Can you pass me her cell? Going through you every time is killing me lol
Ha, fair. Sending it now. Also heads up — Saturday Market east entrance moves for 3 weeks next month, construction near Burnside.
Good to know. I'm bringing Jess there after a Hawthorne shift next week anyway — she wants to scout vendors for the hotel's local sourcing pitch.
Tell her to come find me first, I'll give her the real rundown. Two new cheesemakers and a smoked fish guy starting after the new year, both worth her time.
Smoked fish is interesting — F&B director's been on me about local protein sourcing for months. I'll pass your number. Merci Rodrigo.
Bernard — locking in my Thursday order. Need two 500ml Grade A Dark Robust and one jar of the maple butter. Can you do Wednesday delivery to Beaverton?
Oui, merci Yves. Wednesday afternoon works, dark is in stock. Maple butter — running low though, I've got one jar left, that's it until the next batch run.
One jar's fine, grab it for me. What time Wednesday — I'm on morning shift til 2 so just drop at home if it's after noon. Sienna will be there.
Got it, I'll text her when I'm 20 minutes out. You want the smoked maple finishing salt too? New batch just came in, it's good.
Oh — yes, add a small tin. What's the total looking like?
Dark x2 + butter + smoked salt comes to $67 before tax. Same e-transfer as always?
Done, sending tonight after my shift ends. Merci Bernard, tu me sauves chaque semaine 😅
Toujours! Bon shift at the Hawthorne 👍
